Localization.Description: An exploitation of a logical error when creating a folder that requires administrator rights to access. This exploitation allows to elevate user's privilege level to SYSTEM when a specific trigger triggers.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host} exploited a logical error when creating the folder {object.path} that requires administrator rights to access in order to obtain the maximum privilege level
On host {event_src.host}, a logical error was exploited in the process of creating the folder {object.path} that requires administrator rights to access in order to obtain the maximum privilege level
